task.title: Text Lisa Nilsson from your phone
task.detail:
Lisa (#12 founding, $320 MRR) referred Amber Higgs. Send a quick thank-you + confirm the team-plan conversation is still on for this week.

SMS body to paste:
"Hey Lisa — Heath here. Big thanks for sending Amber my way; we connected and she's reviewing the founder offer. Still want to grab 20 min this week to walk through the team plan? I can do Wed or Thu afternoon."
